title: Pool import, automated distribution and investor notifications are live
content_html:
A big set of features is live on Cryptool today.

For fund admins:

  • Import past investments from spreadsheets or competitor platforms in one click
  • Distribute to all members or selected groups instantly
  • Automatic pool to user linking by email or signed wallet

For investors and users:

  • Update the distribution wallet per pool or chain in one click
  • Track every distribution from a single dashboard
  • Full visibility into when, what and how much you receive

This is a first in the industry: free, accessible to everyone, and built to replace the spreadsheet workflows that fund admins have been stuck with for years.
author: Cryptool
